hero.title: My Journey to South Korea
hero.subtitle: Discovering City and Korean Culture and an Unforgettable Study Exchange

stages.title: Busan
stages.desc: Our first destination welcomed us with colorful markets, and stunning coastal views. Busan's vibrant energy and blend of tradition and modernity captured our hearts from day one.

stages.title: Korean Culinary Adventure
stages.desc: From street food to fine dining, every meal was an exploration. Kimchi, bibimbap, and tteokbokki were gateways to understanding Korean culture.

stages.title: The Study Project & BISF Festival
stages.desc: Our exchange program brought us together with local students. This spring, we had the opportunity to attend the BISFF in Busan.

stages.title: Seoul
stages.desc: K-pop districts, ancient temples, modern skyscrapers, contradictions beautifully. Every neighborhood told a different story of Korea's past and future.

cards.title: Busan's Maritime Magic
cards.desc: A walk along Haeundae Beach at golden hour, with waves crashing and the city lights beginning to twinkle.

cards.title: A Taste of Korea
cards.desc: From making bibimbap to sampling street food at night markets. Every bite tells a story.

cards.title: Seoul After Dark
cards.desc: Neon lights, bustling streets, and unforgettable nights exploring Gangnam, Itaewon, and beyond.

items.title: Busan's Hidden Neighborhoods
items.desc: Beyond the tourist trails, we discovered quaint cafes, vintage shops, and locals-only restaurants that became our favorite retreats.

items.title: Temple Visits & Spiritual Moments
items.desc: Quiet mornings at ancient temples, meditating alongside monks and finding peace in Korea's spiritual heritage.

items.title: Language & Cultural Exchanges
items.desc: Learning Korean phrases, sharing our cultures, and building friendships that transcended language barriers.

items.title: BISF Festival Connections
items.desc: Collaborating with international students, presenting our project, and realizing the power of global collaboration.

parallax.text: I absolutely loved discovering and exploring Korea, and being in this futuristic world was an incredible experience. I made sure to live every moment to the fullest, and sharing this adventure with my colleagues brought even more happiness to the whole trip

chapters.title: Busan
chapters.description: Busan gave us our first real sense of the country. The city creates an incredible contrast where the ocean meets massive skyscrapers, but the real impact came from the local rhythm. Walking through the streets and along the harbor, we immediately felt the genuine warmth of the people. It required us to quickly adapt, listen, and find our bearings in a completely new environment

chapters.title: Korean Culinary Adventure
chapters.description: Food is central to the entire Korean experience. Every meal felt like a discovery, completely shifting our usual habits. Gathering around the table became a daily ritual that brought us closer together. Sharing these unexpected flavors and dishes was our most direct connection to the culture and to each other

chapters.title: Seoul
chapters.description: Seoul offered a completely different energy. The city feels like a leap into tomorrow, driven by endless lights and a futuristic pace. Exploring its streets made us realize how fast the world can move, yet traditional life still manages to hold its place in the center of it all. It was the sharp, intense conclusion our journey needed

chapters.title: The Study Project & BISF Festival
chapters.description: Our exchange program brought us together with local students. This spring, we had the opportunity to attend the BISFF in Busan. The Busan International Short Film Festival served as the professional core of our journey. Being on the ground put our studies into perspective. We spent our time analyzing the inner mechanics of a major cultural event, observing how the industry operates, and seeing firsthand how stories cross borders. That intense, fast-paced environment gave real meaning to our work

conclusion.title: The Journey Comes Full Circle
conclusion.description: Our time in Korea is over. This adventure shaped us through the food we shared, the laughs, the challenges, and the friendships we built. It showed us that human connection transcends borders. Every photo reminds us how much this journey changed who we are. Thank you, Korea. We will be back.

footer.title: Ready to Explore the World?
